title: Stereotactic ablative radiotherapy (SABR) for pelvic nodal oligorecurrence in prostate cancer.
abstract: This study evaluated the clinical outcomes of stereotactic ablative radiotherapy (SABR) in the treatment of oligometastatic pelvic node prostate cancer to delay androgen deprivation therapy (ADT).
trial_name: Outcomes of observation vs stereotactic ablative radiation for oligometastatic prostate cancer
